raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Acera Health has applied for licenses to operate social rehabilitation facilities in Orange County.",
    "An operator’s ability to abide by regulations is an important indicator of the quality of care they will offer vulnerable patients.",
    "Regulations are established to ensure patient safety and healthy outcomes.",
    "Residents of the Upper Newport Bay community have reported that Acera Health has violated several regulations for social rehabilitation operators.",
    "Acera Health has allegedly performed construction activity without approved construction permits.",
    "The City issued a Stop Work notice to Acera Health for 'no building permit', 'no electrical permit', and 'no mechanical permit.'",
    "Acera Health does not have a drug rehab license, which makes their online advertising regarding treatment for sobriety or chemical dependency false and misleading.",
    "Acera Health's website solicited patient insurance information before being licensed, which violates regulation number 80011."
  ]
}
```
